__comment: path: deploy/dashboards/baseline.json — DQ Platform baseline dashboard (ADR-0045 + B2-24). Grafana-compatible JSON model covering the five panels foundation 05 §"Dashboards" committed. Panels 1-3 query BigQuery via a `dq-bigquery` data source; panels 4-5 query Prometheus via a `dq-prometheus` data source and render "no data" until metric emission lands per ADR-0039 §"Baseline-dashboard implementation — deferred". See ../dashboards/README.md for the import workflow and data-source configuration. Panel queries cite the ADR-0039 contract surface (column names, metric names) verbatim.
title: DQ Platform — Baseline

list.name: bq_dataset
list.label: BigQuery results dataset
list.description: Per-env results dataset (local|qa|prod); replace with dq_results_qa or dq_results_prod when targeting other envs.

panels.title: Run success rate over time
panels.description: Bucketed success-vs-non-success ratio over time, against dq_executions_current per ADR-0039 §"Table contract". The canonical-view projection filters retries to the latest recorded_at per execution_id per ADR-0003 §2.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(recorded_at, HOUR) AS time,
  COUNTIF(status = 'success') AS success,
  COUNTIF(status IN ('failed', 'error', 'aborted')) AS non_success
FROM `${bq_dataset}.dq_executions_current`
WHERE recorded_at >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Per-entity check pass/fail rate
panels.description: Per (entity, check_id) × result counts over the dashboard time range, against dq_check_results joined to dq_executions for the entity column. Result enum values are pass / fail / degraded / error per ADR-0004 + ADR-0039 §"dq_check_results guaranteed columns".

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ex.entity AS entity,
  cr.check_id AS check_id,
  cr.result AS result,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM `${bq_dataset}.dq_check_results` cr
JOIN `${bq_dataset}.dq_executions_current` ex
  ON cr.execution_id = ex.execution_id
 WHERE cr.executed_at >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
GROUP BY entity, check_id, result
ORDER BY entity, check_id, result

panels.title: Cost per entity per day
panels.description: Daily sum of bytes-scanned per entity, extracted from dq_check_results.evidence_summary JSON. The `bytes_scanned` sub-field is undocumented per ADR-0039 OQ-3 — the query treats it as best-effort and returns 0 for rows without it. When the field-level inventory is formalised, this panel's query stays the same.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(cr.executed_at, DAY) AS time,
  ex.entity AS entity,
  SUM(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(cr.evidence_summary, '$.bytes_scanned') AS INT64)) AS bytes_scanned
FROM `${bq_dataset}.dq_check_results` cr
JOIN `${bq_dataset}.dq_executions_current` ex
  ON cr.execution_id = ex.execution_id
WHERE cr.executed_at >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY time, entity
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Alerting volume per entity (proxy for owner)
panels.description: Rate of non-success execution counts per entity over the dashboard time range, from the Prometheus-emitted dq_runs_total counter per ADR-0039 §"Metric contract". The owner-level rollup is computed at panel-query time by joining the entity label to _owners.yaml — until the engine surfaces an `owner` label directly, the entity axis is the per-owner proxy (one owner per entity per ADR-0006 CC9). Renders "no data" until metric emission code lands per ADR-0039 §"Baseline-dashboard implementation — deferred".

panels.title: Scheduler health
panels.description: Two gauges from the Prometheus-emitted dq_queue_depth (scheduled vs running) and dq_scheduler_triggers_managed (healthy vs errored) metrics per ADR-0039 §"Metric contract". Renders "no data" until metric emission code lands per ADR-0039 §"Baseline-dashboard implementation — deferred".
